1xBet Aviator is a crash game where you follow a plane on the screen and try to cash out before it flies away. The multiplier starts at x1.00 and rises every second, so the key decision is when to lock in the result before the round ends unexpectedly.

1xBet Aviator ni mchezo wa crash ambapo unafuatilia ndege kwenye skrini na unajaribu kufanya Cash Out kabla haijaondoka. Multiplier huanza kwa x1.00 na inapanda kila sekunde, kwa hiyo uamuzi muhimu ni lini kufunga matokeo kabla raundi haijaisha bila kutarajiwa.
Play 1xBet Aviator

The platform works under Curacao eGaming No. 1668/JAZ, is managed by ACOM Latin America N.V., and supports a broad international audience across desktop and mobile.

Jukwaa linafanya kazi chini ya Curacao eGaming No. 1668/JAZ, linaendeshwa na ACOM Latin America N.V., na linasaidia hadhira ya kimataifa kwenye desktop na simu.

Getting started is straightforward: create an account, complete any required confirmation step, fund the balance, and open Aviator from the casino section or search bar.
Kuanza ni rahisi: unda akaunti, kamilisha hatua yoyote ya uthibitishaji inayohitajika, weka salio, na ufungue Aviator kutoka sehemu ya kasino au upau wa utafutaji.
Register - open the official 1xBet website, choose a registration method, and enter the requested details.
Jisajili - fungua tovuti rasmi ya 1xBet, chagua njia ya usajili, na weka maelezo yaliyoombwa.
Confirm the account - use the email or SMS step if the platform asks for verification.
Thibitisha akaunti - tumia hatua ya barua pepe au SMS ikiwa jukwaa linaomba uthibitishaji.
Make a deposit - add funds with a card, e-wallet, crypto option, or another method available to your account.
Weka amana - ongeza fedha kwa kadi, pochi ya kielektroniki, chaguo la crypto, au njia nyingine inayopatikana kwa akaunti yako.
Find Aviator - use the casino lobby or the search function to open the game.
Pata Aviator - tumia lobby ya kasino au utafutaji kufungua mchezo.
Set the stake - choose the bet size before the round begins.
Weka dau - chagua ukubwa wa dau kabla raundi haijaanza.
Cash out in time - confirm the win before the plane leaves the screen.
Fanya Cash Out kwa wakati - thibitisha ushindi kabla ndege haijaondoka kwenye skrini.

Returning players can log in from the site or app and go directly to the casino section. For payments and account security, 1xBet may request KYC documents such as proof of identity or address before certain transactions are approved.

Wachezaji wanaorudi wanaweza kuingia kutoka tovuti au app na kwenda moja kwa moja kwenye sehemu ya kasino. Kwa malipo na usalama wa akaunti, 1xBet inaweza kuomba hati za KYC kama uthibitisho wa utambulisho au anwani kabla ya kuidhinisha miamala fulani.
You can play in a browser or through the 1xBet mobile app on Android and iOS. The app is designed for quick account access, deposits, and game search on smaller screens.
Unaweza kucheza kwenye kivinjari au kupitia app ya simu ya 1xBet kwenye Android na iOS. App imeundwa kwa ufikiaji wa haraka wa akaunti, amana, na utafutaji wa michezo kwenye skrini ndogo.

fungua tovuti ya 1xBet kwenye simu yako na nenda kwenye sehemu ya Programu za Simu;
choose the Android or iOS version;
chagua toleo la Android au iOS;
for Android, download the APK file; for iOS, continue to the App Store route offered by the platform;
kwa Android, pakua faili ya APK; kwa iOS, endelea kwenye njia ya App Store inayotolewa na jukwaa;
install the app and log in to your account.
sakinisha app na uingie kwenye akaunti yako.

Simu nyingi za kisasa zinaweza kuendesha app kwa urahisi mradi zina nafasi ya kutosha ya hifadhi na mfumo wa uendeshaji uliosasishwa.

Andika "Aviator" na ufungue mchezo kutoka matokeo.
Set the bet size, place one or two bets, and follow the round.
Weka ukubwa wa dau, weka dau moja au mbili, na ufuate raundi.
It is the Aviator crash game on 1xBet, where you follow a rising multiplier and try to cash out before the round ends.
Ni mchezo wa crash Aviator kwenye 1xBet, ambapo unafuatilia multiplier inayopanda na unajaribu kufanya Cash Out kabla raundi haijaisha.
Set the amount in the betting panel, confirm the bet before the round starts, and use cash out while the multiplier is still active.
Weka kiasi kwenye paneli ya dau, thibitisha dau kabla raundi haijaanza, na tumia Cash Out wakati multiplier bado inafanya kazi.
Yes. 1xBet offers Android and iOS access as well as a mobile browser version, so Aviator is available on both desktop and mobile.
Ndiyo. 1xBet inatoa ufikiaji wa Android na iOS pamoja na toleo la kivinjari cha simu, kwa hiyo Aviator inapatikana kwenye desktop na simu.
The main offer is a welcome package worth up to $1,750 plus 150 free spins across the first four deposits, subject to the current terms.
Ofa kuu ni paketi ya kukaribisha yenye thamani hadi $1,750 pamoja na 150 free spins kwenye amana nne za kwanza, kulingana na masharti ya sasa.
1xBet operates under Curacao eGaming No. 1668/JAZ, and Aviator outcomes are generated by certified random mechanics. Always follow the gambling rules that apply in your location.

1xBet Aviator est un jeu crash où vous suivez un avion à l’écran et tentez d’encaisser avant qu’il ne parte. Le multiplicateur démarre à x1,00 et monte chaque seconde : l’enjeu est de figer le résultat au bon moment avant que la manche ne se termine de façon imprévue.

1xBet Aviator ezali lisano crash wapi olanda avion na ecran mpe o lingi ko Cash Out liboso ete e bima. Multiplier e banda na x1,00 mpe ekobaka chaque seconde : enjeu ezali ko figer résultat na moment ya malamu liboso ete round esilaka na ndenge oyo ozali koyeba te.
Pack de bienvenue jusqu’à $1,750 + 150 tours gratuits
Pack ya bienvenue tii na $1,750 + 150 free spins

La plateforme fonctionne sous licence Curacao eGaming No. 1668/JAZ, est gérée par ACOM Latin America N.V. et s’adresse à un large public international sur ordinateur et mobile.

Démarrer est simple : créez un compte, complétez l’éventuelle étape de confirmation, créditez le solde et ouvrez Aviator depuis la section casino ou la barre de recherche.
Kobanda ezali simple : créer compte, compléter étape ya confirmation soki ezali, créditer solde mpe fungola Aviator na section casino to barre ya recherche.
Inscription - ouvrez le site officiel 1xBet, choisissez un mode d’inscription et saisissez les informations demandées.
Inscription - fungola site officiel 1xBet, pona mode ya inscription mpe kotia ba informations oyo e demander.
Confirmer le compte - suivez l’étape e-mail ou SMS si la plateforme demande une vérification.

Trouver Aviator - utilisez le lobby casino ou la recherche pour ouvrir le jeu.
Koluka Aviator - salisa lobby casino to recherche mpo na ko fungola lisano.
Régler la mise - choisissez la taille de mise avant le début de la manche.
Régler mise - pona taille ya mise liboso ya ebandeli ya round.
Encaisser à temps - validez le gain avant que l’avion ne quitte l’écran.
Cash Out na tango - confirmer gain liboso ete avion e bima na ecran.
